services.title: Full-Stack Web Development
services.description: End-to-end web apps built on the MERN stack — from database schema to a polished, responsive UI.

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Clean, responsive interfaces built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React, focused on usability.

services.title: REST API Development
services.description: Designing and building secure REST APIs with Node.js and Express, including JWT-based auth.

services.title: Database Design
services.description: Structuring MongoDB collections and relationships for clean, performant data access.

projects.title: PharmaCare Pro
projects.shortDescription: Pharmacy management system with inventory alerts and digital prescription generation.
projects.description: PharmaCare Pro is a pharmacy-management concept built to demonstrate a complete workflow for handling medicine inventory and prescriptions through a clean, responsive interface — built as a front-end prototype focused on the UI/UX of the workflow.
features: Inventory dashboard with low-stock and expiry alerts

projects.title: Laboratory Management System
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack MERN app for running a diagnostic lab: doctors, patients, tests and prescriptions.
projects.description: A full-stack MERN application for managing a diagnostic laboratory. Admins, doctors and receptionists get role-based access to manage doctors, patients, tests and prescriptions, with built-in printing and email delivery for completed prescriptions.
features: Role-based auth for Admin, Doctor and Receptionist (JWT)
Per-doctor test catalogue with pricing and discounts
Multi-step prescription builder with automatic billing
One-click prescription printing and email delivery via Gmail SMTP

projects.title: Marg — Student Career Guidance Platform
projects.shortDescription: MERN platform helping students explore career paths and request guidance from counselors.
projects.description: Marg is a student career-guidance platform covering the Science, Commerce, Arts and Law/Medicine streams. Students can explore careers and request counseling sessions, with OTP-based email verification and automatic confirmation emails handling the back-and-forth.
features: OTP-based email verification for counseling requests
Automated confirmation emails for students and admins
Career resources across multiple academic streams
Protected routes and authenticated user sessions

projects.title: JavaScript Mini-Projects Collection
projects.shortDescription: A growing collection of small vanilla-JS practice builds: clock, calculator, QR generator and more.
projects.description: A collection of small, self-contained front-end exercises built while practicing core JavaScript and DOM manipulation — each one focused on a single interaction pattern.
features: Digital clock and a number-guessing game
Working calculator and QR code generator
Live character counter and click counter
